content: agent2: implementing on_resolve callback for AudioBlock.resolve_audio() in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py. Will only touch resolve_audio method.

Current diff only touches resolve_audio's signature/body + Callable import. I don't see your zero-byte check applied yet in the file - let me know when you push it and I'll rebase my callback around it (call on_resolve after your size check passes, using the same buffer).
